ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: If this plugin adds value for you and you would like to help support continued development, please buy me a coffee:
ast.target: 如果这个插件对你有帮助，并且你愿意支持持续开发，请请我喝杯咖啡：

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Amazing Marvin Plugin Settings

Configure your Amazing Marvin connection and ribbon leaf defaults.

For more information, you can read more on Amazing Marvin API GitHub
ast.target:
Amazing Marvin 插件设置

配置你的 Amazing Marvin 连接和功能区叶默认值。

更多信息请参阅 Amazing Marvin API GitHub
